summary:
HEALING SERVICES AND SPIRITUAL MEETINGS: Brandon recounts attending a powerful healing service and highlights upcoming spiritual events, including Nancy Dufresne's visit to Oklahoma City and Billy Burke's healing revival in Eufaula, noting a continuous occurrence of similar meetings in the Tulsa area.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF THE END TIMES: Brandon shares specific visions he states were given to him by God, which include an escalation of global wars, a massive asteroid striking the earth, and various terrorist attacks. He speaks of an impending Rapture that will remove all children aged fifteen and under, leaving the remaining population to face the Tribulation. During this Tribulation period, Brandon describes a scenario where drones connected to satellites will hunt individuals who refuse the mark of the beast, and where people will be forced to worship the Antichrist every Friday under threat of death. He also notes that the Antichrist will use extraterrestrial phenomena to explain the sudden disappearance of people.

GLOBAL REVIVAL PREDICTIONS: Brandon details a foreseen spiritual revival occurring underground throughout Asia, specifically identifying China, South Korea, and North Korea as focal points. He states that the movement in North Korea will be heavily supported by angels and will occur despite severe governmental suppression.

NONTRADITIONAL COMMUNION PRACTICES: Brandon demonstrates and encourages a highly individualized approach to taking communion, emphasizing personal relationship over religious tradition. While taking communion, he verbally claims physical healing, protection, and his identity as a spiritual ambassador.

PROTECTIVE PRAYERS FOR PUBLIC FIGURES AND EVENTS: Brandon directs specific protective prayers over prominent figures and large gatherings, including Donald Trump and attendees at an upcoming Coachella rally, asking for angelic protection against terrorist activities. He also extends these prayers to the New York Yankees stadium and other major sporting events, warning of a heightened alert regarding terrorism. Furthermore, he prays for physical rejuvenation and protection over Billye Brim, Sister Allie, and Shelly ahead of an upcoming prayer conference, asking for demonstrations of Shekinah glory.

GEOPOLITICAL AND DOMESTIC INTERCESSIONS: Brandon issues prayers concerning global conflicts, specifically praying for Israel to eliminate the nuclear capabilities of Iran and for the uncovering of biological weapons moving from Syria into Damascus. He also calls for peace in Ukraine and Poland. On a domestic level, he prays for a fair United States election without dishonesty, guiding voters to select godly candidates for the Senate, House, and Presidency. Additionally, he commands the weather to change, calling for a specific three-inch rainfall to end local droughts and fire bans, and later observes that it begins to rain during his speaking.

PERSONAL VISIONS OF HEAVEN: Brandon recounts a personal birthday vision where he and his wife experience a post-Rapture heaven. He describes the setting as a vast green valley resembling the Swiss Alps, where his wife performs cartwheels among butterflies and flowers, and he possesses a glorified, youthful body with a full head of brown hair.
rawData: [October 11, 2024]-[A call to prayer - day 5 - pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/7lkNF1ltIco]-[Good morning, family. How are you all doing today? I am excited to be here. We had a service last night; it was awesome. It was a healing service at church, and there were many of you who watch my videos there. I am excited to meet every single one of you. You come up, introduce yourself, and are so kind to us. We just want to say thank you for your love and for how we are helping you. Many kind people say we are helping them with our videos and are just loving on us. What a blessing. I enjoyed that service and seeing the healing power of God going to His people. I encourage you, if Nancy Dufresne is ever in your area, to go and check it out. I believe she is in Oklahoma City this weekend. Billy Burke is going to be in Eufaula Sunday, Monday, and Tuesday, I believe, for a healing revival there. In the Tulsa area, there are back-to-back meetings all the time, it seems, with healing services and all kinds of things going on. It is awesome. I just want to encourage you all today. People ask me what is coming and what the Lord is showing me. My son said it is amazing how the anointing hits me and it just comes out of me. He said he doesn't know how I remember all the things the Lord has shown me over the last year and a half. But when the Lord shows me things and I have these conversations, it is imprinted in my spirit and my mind; it becomes a part of me. Whenever someone asks me to rehearse it, it just flows. Everything is precisely the way the Lord showed me—nothing added, nothing taken away. If you only knew all the things the Lord has shown me. It is like putting a puzzle together. My son said people will learn if they want to know what the Lord is saying. I just tell you what is coming. If you don't want to know, then don't ask, I guess. But I am going to tell you: Jesus is coming. That's not scary unless you don't know Him or don't have your name written in the Lamb’s Book of Life. That is the only thing you should be scared about. Everything else is under the blood; we have a covenant and authority over the devil. Yes, we are having birthing pains, and things are going to get darker, but the light is going to get lighter. The glory of the Lord is going to show up in a way the world has never seen. There is going to be an outpouring of His Spirit, and walking in the supernatural will be as easy as taking your next breath. I have seen wars, an escalation of war, and a massive asteroid striking the earth. I have seen terrorist attacks and crazy things that might seem scary, but it is not scary to the believer who has authority. I hope you understand that we don't have to walk in fear or a spirit of torment because perfect love casts out all fear. These are just birthing pains. People ask how it doesn't bother me. I say I am not going to participate in that. I live in this world, but I am not of it. I am a joint-heir with Jesus Christ. I deliver the message the Lord tells me. I know who He is in me, and I am believing for demonstrations of glory. Some things we can pray away, and some things are set in stone because of Bible prophecy. But for things like terrorist attacks, the Lord is warning us so we can pray against them. We have overcome the world. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. We don't fear death or what the devil has in store. As long as we are here as the salt, we take authority over the devil. We are in the last of the last nanoseconds. We are not even in the last days or minutes anymore. It is just a sliver of time left. I am telling you, Jesus is coming. When I see Him face to face, He tells me, 'Brandon, I'm coming.' People's focus is off. There needs to be an urgency about the Father's business. It is serious; we are at a serious time in history. The sun is setting on this dispensation of Grace. We are about to step into the Tribulation, but the Rapture of the church is right there. I believe Jesus is coming for His church; He is not a wife-beater who will beat His bride. If you seek Him daily and have communion with Him, He won't leave you to endure that. I question the relationship of those who think otherwise. If you are lukewarm or have one foot in the world, I would be concerned. I am here to warn you; I am the Watchman on the wall screaming that Jesus is coming. I have seen a glimpse of the Tribulation, and it is literal hell on Earth. If the days weren't shortened, no one would make it. If you are left behind, you better run to the mountains because the drones will find you. There will be thousands of them searching for people without the mark of the beast. This is connected to things like Neuralink and Starlink satellites. They will use aliens and signs in the heavens to explain away the Rapture. I saw the Antichrist on TV explaining where all the people and children went. Everyone 15 and younger was taken in the Rapture; they didn't go through the Tribulation. I felt an urgency to warn you again. I have seen the temple where you will be required to worship the Antichrist every Friday or be killed. But this is not for you if you get on fire for Jesus. Seek Him. Last night, the presence of God was so strong on Kenneth Hagin's daughter. I could feel the tangible presence of the Father. Don't take these miracles for granted. Get your life right; you're running out of time. There was a YouTuber from China who took my video. Some people were freaking out, saying I need to tell them to take it down, but if he is not against me, he is for me. He had over six million subscribers, and the video started to go viral. People in China were watching it. This man just put it on there, and in China, I just couldn't believe it. Three... Six million views on this one video of people, and I wonder—all these Chinese folks, welcome. If you're from China, Jesus has a plan for you. There's going to be a great revival in the underground churches. I saw these streams of fire and gold going throughout Asia and China, and there will be an underground revival beyond anything that will come outward. I saw them trying to suppress it in the government, and the glory was so strong that even the government was not able to suppress what was about to take place in Asia. I saw the move of God even throughout all Asia, through South Korea, and I even saw it in North Korea. I saw a great revival that would take place, and the Lord said it would not be on TV like it would in other places in North Korea. But He said, 'Son, I will visit the people of North Korea like I did My children of Israel whenever Pharaoh was oppressing them.' He told me that there would be a major harvest of souls in North Korea, and I believe it. He said He was sending His angels, so much so. I wasn't really planning on going down this road today; I just let the Holy Spirit flow. I want to pray. I've got my communion, and I did this for the religious ones. Most people go, 'You've got to have a wafer and you've got to have this.' Sometimes, if you don't even have a wafer, I just take whatever I've got. I don't mean any disrespect to the communion, but He knows my heart and He searches me. He knows me, and I always go before Him because His body and His blood are precious to me. If you don't have anything in your house and you think, 'I don't have that stuff, I can't take communion with you'—and I get foreigners and people from other countries who don't have anything, and they think they can't take communion because they don't have that little cup and the elements—I did this for you today: it's just a piece of popcorn. Jesus wants you to be a part too. You can just find whatever you have in your house; just have a relationship with Him. He loves you. You just get a piece of popcorn, or a tortilla if you make your own, or a piece of cereal. Get a Cheerio if you have some; get something that represents it to you. Just have it with all your heart; it is about your relationship with the Father. You go before Him and you take this communion like I'm fixing to do. All I had was some juice, some grapefruit juice. It doesn't have to be grape juice; it can be apple juice or orange juice—whatever you have, you take it with the Father. We're not going to be religious and we're not going to be bound by religion. We're not going to be like the Pharisees on this channel; we are free. Jesus loves us and His grace is sufficient for me. I had to make sure I don't have anything in my nose. I told my son—he's not in here with me tonight—he always checks my nose for me. God bless us. So, you take the communion through whatever you have and you do it with all your heart and say, 'Father, take it with me.' You can pause this and come back. I take my juice, and this is what I do. Whatever I have—I may be driving down the road and I just want to take communion—I say, 'Father, Your body is here and it flows through me as I take this body inside of me.' You said in Your Word that by Your stripes I am healed. Father, I take this by faith in the name of Jesus and I say my body, from my mind all the way down to the soles of my feet, is healed. You said by Your stripes I am healed, and greater is He that is in me than he that is in the world. I just say He's inside of me. I'm taking this by faith—that Jesus Christ dwells on the inside of me and I'm in covenant with Him. I am His ambassador in this earth. As ambassadors from heaven, everything that heaven has is backing me: their Treasury Department, their war room—everything I need is coming from heaven to me by His covenant because I am an ambassador in the earth. An ambassador to America goes to these places and all of America backs them; all of heaven backs me. I have power and authority to raise the dead, to lay hands on the sick and see them recover, and to cast out devils. Freely I have been given, freely I give it out. I'm an ambassador of the kingdom of God. So Father, we take this body right now in the name of Jesus and we thank You, Father, that You died for me and You rose again on the third day and that You dwell in me richly in the name of Jesus. Now I take the blood and I lift it up before You, and I thank You, Father, for the blood. I plead the blood over all my sin and I thank You, Lord, that I'm covered by the blood of Jesus. I thank You, Lord, that greater is He that is in me than he that is in the world and that no weapon formed against me is going to prosper. I plead the blood of Jesus over me. This isn't being sin-conscious. I heard some people say, 'Well, you're too sin-conscious.' No, I take the blood and I enter in by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of my testimony. I enter into His throne room. So I take this blood right now in Jesus' name and I thank Him. Simple. You don't have to have my little cup that I took last night. You just take communion with the Father. That's easy, and it's not disrespectful. Some people say that was disrespectful; whatever, the Lord knows my heart and He knows your heart, and He's just excited that you're coming before Him. He just wants a relationship with you. Everybody asks me, 'Where did you get those cups? I can't take communion.' Oh goodness. Let's pray and enter into His throne room right now with thanksgiving and praise and just thank Him for His blood. Father, if you make much of the blood, the blood will make much of you. That's all I say. If you get serious with God, He'll get serious with you. Get serious with the Lord. Father, I just thank You for this prayer time. We're going to pray for the New York Yankees and the stadium, or any kind of baseball or sporting event—any major sporting event—against any kind of attack because there's a lot of things going on right now. There's a heightened alert in the spirit realm about terrorist activities, and we're going to plead the blood over this nation: that we are never in the wrong place at the wrong time, that we're always in the right place at the right time. We won't allow that stuff to happen. You drive around your city and you just start pleading the blood and applying the blood of Jesus over things. Little Tommy or whoever goes to school today: 'Father, we cover the little guy in the blood, that no weapon formed against this boy will prosper.' We cover him in the blood and we thank You that Your angels are protecting them. I plead the blood all around that school, that Satan will not take any cheap shots of sickness and disease; nothing shall by any means hurt him or harm him. I cover my area, my neighborhood, and where I go to the grocery store. Father, where I put the soles of my feet, I plead the blood and I thank You, Lord, that Your covering covers me in my car, over my house, and over my neighborhood. I drive around and I just plead the blood over everything. That's just what I do and that's what I believe. I listen to Sister Billye Brim and I listen to Kenneth Hagin on the authority of the believer. There are a lot of people that teach this, and I would encourage you to go and find her stuff on the authority of the believer. I have a channel over there where I put her 'Authority of the Believer' stuff. I need to listen to it over and over again because it gets down inside of you. That's how I do it and it works. I plead the blood over the weather and I take authority over the weather: that it will not come nigh us us—major tornadoes and things like that. I always put a hedge around us, but if it does come, a thousand shall fall at my side and ten thousand at my right hand, but it will not come nigh us me; it will not touch us. I'm trying to teach you all this stuff, and that's what you stand on: Psalm 91. You have to. If you abide in Me and My words remain in you, you shall ask what you will and it shall be done. Take your authority with Psalm 91 and use that as your foundation of scripture. Applying that to your life is how you build your foundation: Psalm 91, Psalm 23, and then you stand on it. Use that and get a revelation knowledge that He is your defense, He is your protector, and He is your helper in a time of need. Everything you ever need—boop! He's a shepherd; you shall not want. That's what you base your prayer off of. That's how He takes care of you and your family: that no pestilence, no plagues, and nothing comes nigh you. I hope I'm helping y'all today. You have to understand who you are for your family and for your town. You may have a neighbor who is in the occult and they don't want the blood over their house; they want the devil. Well, that's their choice. But as for me and my house, we serve the Lord. I even take anointing oil—olive oil, you know, you get at Mardel or you can even order some on Amazon—and I anoint my shoes and I walk around my house. Everywhere my soles touch, I have anointed around my house so that nothing comes nigh my home. Do you get that? Apply it over your bed and where you sleep. If you're having night terrors or bad dreams, apply the blood of Jesus over your sleep. Apply the blood. When you make much of the blood, the blood will make much for you. You've got to apply it over your little boy or your little girl if they're having bad dreams. Put the blood on their head and say, 'I anoint you with oil and I cover you with the blood of Jesus. You sleep well, baby.' Just do it like that; the Lord is faithful. I don't know what caused me to get off on all that, but it needed to be said. I guess the Holy Spirit wanted it. Okay, well, I'm going back to praying now. Father, I thank You for Your anointing. We yield to You, Holy Spirit. Help me to pray. We yield ourselves today to pray through us. There's so much going on in the world, Lord, and we can go in many different directions, like a dog chasing its tail trying to figure out what to pray for. No, You help me pray, Holy Spirit, for You know and see all things. I'm not moved by the needs; I'm moved by what You have. If you're moved by needs, the devil is always pushing you from need to need because he's the one that creates those things. But the Bible says that God supplies all my needs; everything is met by Him. Father, here I am talking again. I thank You for Your blood, Your mercy, and Your goodness. We take authority over the devil right now concerning our areas and we say, 'Satan, thus far and no further! You will not do anything to hurt or harm or cause calamity over these areas.' Now, Father, we plead the blood over Coachella and we plead the blood over President Trump. We thank You, Lord, that no weapon formed against him will prosper. We plead the blood all around him and we thank You, Lord, that Your angels protect him and bear him up in their hands, lest he dash his foot against a stone. I thank You, Father, for the angels that protect the people and the bystanders there, that no weapon formed against them would prosper. I stand in the gap with them and thank You that any terrorist activity at the Coachella rally on Saturday would not take place. We take authority over it, Father, and we thank You that You are uncovering and dismantling anything the devil has planned to steal, kill, and destroy in any area of this Coachella event. I thank You, Father, for Your angels and for the great protection You have over everybody there. We pray a covering over next week over Sister Billye's meeting and the prayer conference that's coming. We call forth the Holy Spirit for a move of demonstrations and manifestations like we've never seen before. I cover that conference in the blood. Satan, there will be no calamity, no injuries, and no demonic attack of any kind. We hold the blood of Jesus against you and we thank You, Lord, that Your angels are going before us. We will have demonstrations of healing and manifestations of Your presence with Shekinah glory in the name of Jesus. I thank You, Lord, for sustaining Sister Billie and giving her long life. You said in Your Word, 'With long life will I satisfy you and show you My salvation.' We ask for special strength over her tonight; that during this conference she'll feel younger and more youthful than she's ever felt to accomplish the work she's supposed to do. She is not tired; she has energy because her youth is renewed like the eagles. And over Shelly, the worship team, and the people leading and preaching, we pray a supernatural rejuvenation. Sister Allie praying—Father, I cover them in the blood. They are strong in the Lord and the power of His might. Fill their mouths with good things and they will have a fresh rhema word from You. Prophecy will come forth, and manifestations of Your glory will manifest in these meetings. We thank You, Father, that there is no demonic hindrance that would come nigh us us in any way. We thank You, Father, for great days ahead of us. We praise You for the weather and we thank You for rain. We call forth the rain from the north, south, east, and west and say, 'In the name of Jesus, rain, come now!' We claim three inches of rain all for Your glory. I take authority over drought and I say, 'Drought, you bow your knee!' We have authority over the weather and we call forth a low-pressure system to bring in the showers and the coolness. As we go to the fall conference, it will be beautiful weather. It's time; summer needs to go and it's time for fall. We need rain—not ice or snow, but cool showers—so there will be no more fires or fire bans. We consider that done. Now, Lord, we pray over Israel. They said they're going to strike; I keep seeing in the spirit that they're going to go after Iran. Lord, You set a time frame which I'm not going to talk about, but I saw a time frame when they would do so. I thank You, Lord, that they would eliminate the nuclear capabilities of Iran. We call for an uncovering of biological weapons coming out of Syria into Damascus. We call forth an uncovering in the name of Jesus, that there would be no terrorist attacks of biological weapons in America or in retaliation for what happens in Israel. I thank You, Lord, for Ukraine and Poland and this war over there. I thank You that we can call for peace. I've seen war escalating, but we pray for peace over the storms. We pray that those people could live a peaceful life and their children would not be raised up in war, that there would be great churches and great revival there—one last call. I thank You, Father, for a great harvest of souls in Europe, China, and all of Asia. We call forth a harvest for the kingdom of God—a raiding of the enemy's camp, pulling people out of hell and into heaven. We are ambassadors of the Lord Jesus Christ. I thank You, Father, that this nation, America, will have a fair election. I call forth a fair election: no cheating, no dishonesty. I call for blinders to be removed off of their eyes so people would see their error in their ways. Holy Spirit, work on their hearts to vote godly for Senate, House, and President. We call forth godly votes right now. You said we will be a sheep nation, not a goat nation. I thank You, Father, for creative ideas to get wealth to support the kingdom. I thank You for food, supplements, and supplies to feed them when the harvest comes. We give You all the glory, honor, and praise. We're not going backwards; we're going forwards. Satan, get your hands off of our money! Our bank accounts are full to overflow with no lack and no debt. It's raining! Well, glory to God, it's raining! I hear Your rain, Lord; that's real rain. Thank You, Jesus. We just prayed for it and the Lord brought it. I don't even think that was in the forecast. Well, isn't that amazing? I hope you hear the thunder. Jesus is coming soon, morning or night or noon; many will meet their doom, trumpets will surely sound. All of the dead shall rise, righteous meet in the sky, going where no one dies, heavenward bound. I love that song; He's coming so soon. Do you remember I told you for my birthday He said, 'I want to show you a glimpse after the Rapture again'? My wife and I were there, and it was a green valley in heaven as far as the eye could see. I could see beautiful snow-capped mountains like the Swiss Alps in the background. She said, 'Brandon, it really happened! We finally made it!' She was doing cartwheels in the field and I could see the butterflies and the beautiful flowers. I was standing there in awe, and He gave me the glimpse of it. I was in a glorified body and I had hair! I've wanted hair for so long, and He gave me a full set of beautiful brown hair. We looked so young and vibrant and healthy. He said, 'Son, I'm coming.' I pray you're on the boat with us. If you don't know Jesus Christ as your Lord and Savior, I have to give you an opportunity to meet Him. If you're watching this thinking, 'Man, this guy's way out there,' I know something inside of me tells me that He is right. Today is your day for salvation. If you've been left and the Rapture has happened, and this video is still up by chance, say this prayer so that you don't go to hell. If they try to give you the mark, run from it! Don't take it! It's better to get your head taken than to go to hell for eternity. Just say it out your mouth: 'Jesus, I believe You're the Son of God. Write my name in the Lamb's Book of Life. I believe You died for me on the cross and You rose on the third day.' The Bible says if I confess my sins, He is faithful and just to forgive me and cleanse me from all unrighteousness. He'll do that for you today. Now you're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost! If you're still here and Jesus hasn't come yet, get you a Bible, read it until it becomes real to you, and find a good Holy Ghost church. Talk to Him like He's your best friend; get real with God. I appreciate you praying with me. Like the video, please; it helps with the algorithm. If you haven't subscribed already, click that notification bell. I'm going to pray every day until after the election because the Lord said we've got to pray. It's about the days after; don't let your guard down. We've got to pray it all the way through. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much. God bless you all, and we will see you again tomorrow. Bye-bye.]
